disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe breathlessness worsening over ~12 hours in someone told days ago he had inflammation around the heart
trigger_question_examples: When did the breathlessness start and how fast did it come on?
Has anything been going on with your health recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's got really bad over the last half a day. I was told about five days ago I had a viral inflammation around the heart, and now I just can't breathe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Strong preference to sit up and lean forward; leaning or lying back sharply worsens breathlessness and discomfort
trigger_question_examples: Is there any position that makes it better or worse?
What happens if you lean back or lie down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I have to sit forward. The moment I lean back it feels like I can't breathe at all and I nearly passed out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Near-fainting, marked lightheadedness, feeling 'fuzzy' and confused (cerebral hypoperfusion proxy)
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt faint or like you might pass out?
Are you feeling clear-headed, or muddled?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really lightheaded and kind of fuzzy, like I nearly blacked out when I leaned back.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest sensation changed from sharp/catching-with-breathing to a constant heavy pressure
trigger_question_examples: Has the type of chest discomfort changed?
Is it sharp with breathing, or more of a constant pressure now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: A few days ago it was sharp and caught when I breathed in, but now it's a constant heavy pressure.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cold, clammy extremities and pale, sweaty, bluish appearance (peripheral shutdown proxy)
trigger_question_examples: How do his hands and skin look and feel?
Is he sweaty, pale or a bit blue anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His hands are cold and clammy, and he's pale and sweaty — his lips and fingertips look a little blue.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Taking high-dose ibuprofen, started for the recent heart-sac inflammation
trigger_question_examples: What medications is he taking right now?
Was he started on anything for the inflammation?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Just high-dose ibuprofen that they started for the inflammation around the heart. Nothing else regular.
